STRUCTURE_FACTORY_REPO_URL.description: Private GitHub clone URL. Prefer HTTPS token injection or deploy key configured outside git.

STRUCTURE_FACTORY_GIT_REF.description: Pinned branch, tag, or commit to clone.

STRUCTURE_FACTORY_NO_DOWNLOAD.description: Must be set for prep smoke runs.

STRUCTURE_FACTORY_EXECUTION_PROFILE.description: Execution profile selected by the launch manifest.

STRUCTURE_FACTORY_ALLOW_RAW_DOWNLOADS.description: Required for raw-subset profiles. Never set for no-download smoke.

STRUCTURE_FACTORY_OPERATOR_AUTHORIZED.description: Required at runtime for cost-bearing or download-bearing profiles. Do not set in repo manifests as proof of approval.

STRUCTURE_FACTORY_EXECUTION_MODE.description: Use prep only for local dry runs. Real RunPod runs should use real and fail if mock or dry-run evidence appears.

STRUCTURE_FACTORY_STAGE_CONTRACT.description: Optional absolute path to the stage-contract JSON used by the entrypoint.

STRUCTURE_FACTORY_STAGE_PROGRESS.description: Optional absolute path to stage-progress.jsonl. Defaults under /workspace/structure-factory/runs/<run-id>.

STRUCTURE_FACTORY_REMOTE_LAUNCH_ALLOWED.description: Required by execution-ready preflight before paid RunPod launch.

STRUCTURE_FACTORY_SUBSET_PROFILE.description: Raw subset profile such as raw_movies_50 or raw_movies_100.

STRUCTURE_FACTORY_ENABLE_CRYOSPARC.description: Enable CryoSPARC gated lane when CRYOSPARC_LICENSE_ID is provided at runtime.

STRUCTURE_FACTORY_ENABLE_MOTIONCOR3.description: Enable MotionCor3 gated lane when approved runtime access is provided.

STRUCTURE_FACTORY_ENABLE_PHENIX.description: Enable Phenix gated lane when approved runtime access is provided.

STRUCTURE_FACTORY_ENABLE_CHIMERAX.description: Enable ChimeraX gated lane when approved runtime access is provided.

RUNPOD_VOLUME_ID.description: RunPod-provided network volume id when attached.

RUNPOD_GHCR_REGISTRY_AUTH_ID.description: Runtime reference to provider-side GHCR registry auth. Store in RunPod/provider secrets, not git.

RUNPOD_GHCR_USERNAME.description: Runtime GHCR username only when direct registry auth injection is used.

RUNPOD_GHCR_TOKEN.description: Runtime GHCR token only when direct registry auth injection is used. Never commit real values.

CRYOSPARC_LICENSE_ID.description: Optional license-gated runtime value. Never commit real values.

MOTIONCOR3_ACCESS_REF.description: Optional secure reference for MotionCor3 access.

PHENIX_ACCESS_REF.description: Optional secure reference for Phenix installer/license access.

ROSETTA_ACCESS_REF.description: Optional secure reference for Rosetta/PyRosetta access.

ALPHAFOLD3_ACCESS_REF.description: Optional secure reference for AlphaFold 3 code/weights access.
